headline: Subnautica 2 Dev Reveals What to Expect From Upcoming Early Access 1.1 Update
summary: Subnautica 2 developer teases new content for its 1.1 update. A new vehicle is set to be added to the game. A new region focused on the Collector Leviathan is also expected.

headline: Cyberpunk TCG Already Faces Significant Rule Changes After Massive $28M Kickstarter Campaign
summary: Cyberpunk TCG is rolling out major rule changes. This follows a historic $28 million Kickstarter campaign. Gameplay overhauls are occurring before the official launch.

headline: Crimson Desert Has a Pinball Minigame Now Because of Course It Does
summary: Crimson Desert's latest update introduces various quality-of-life changes. The Wyvern can now be used as a mount. Unexpectedly, a pinball minigame has been added.

headline: LEGO Reseller Bricks and Minifigs Will Return 'Stolen' Star Wars Sets to Collector; Parting Ways With Controversial Management
summary: LEGO reseller Bricks & Minifigs will return allegedly 'stolen' Star Wars sets. The company is resolving a controversial situation with a collector. Bricks & Minifigs is also parting ways with its controversial management.

headline: Andrew was sub-letting Royal Lodge cottages, watchdog reveals
summary: A public spending watchdog has reviewed royal property arrangements. It was revealed Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor was sub-letting Royal Lodge cottages. The scrutiny comes amidst broader examinations of royal finances.

headline: World-first vaccine designed by AI could protect against whole families of viruses
summary: Cambridge scientists have tested the world's first AI-designed vaccine. The vaccine is engineered to protect against entire families of viruses. This innovation marks a significant step in medical science.

headline: Teen rapists spared jail partly because of intellectual limitations, sentencing remarks reveal
summary: Teen rapists were spared jail, causing public outcry. Sentencing remarks cited intellectual limitations as a factor. The boys were given youth rehabilitation orders instead.

headline: Two weeks out from crucial Makerfield by-election, here's how the contest is shaping up
summary: The Makerfield by-election is two weeks away. A Question Time exchange provided insights into the candidates. The article details the evolving shape of this crucial political contest.
